metadata.name: 08_变量操作测试流
metadata.description: 专门测试变量赋值与格式转换节点

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["user_json"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_assign", "type": "variable_assignment", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"assignments": [{"variable_name": "temp_value", "value_type": "string", "value": "Initial Value"}, {"variable_name": "computed_value", "value_type": "expression", "value": "1 + 1"}]}}, "label": "变量赋值"}, {"id": "node_transform", "type": "variable_transform", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "user_json", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "user_json"]}], "input_variable": "{user_json}", "transform_type": "extract_json_path", "transform_args": {"path": "data.items.0"}, "output_variable": "extracted_item"}}, "label": "变量转换"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 950, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "temp_value", "type": "string", "source": ["node_assign", "temp_value"]}, {"name": "computed_value", "type": "string", "source": ["node_assign", "computed_value"]}, {"name": "extracted_item", "type": "string", "source": ["node_transform", "extracted_item"]}], "outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "temp", "type": "string", "value": "{temp_value}", "children": []}, {"name": "computed", "type": "string", "value": "{computed_value}", "children": []}, {"name": "extracted", "type": "string", "value": "{extracted_item}", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_assign", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_assign", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_assign_node_transform", "type": "default", "source": "node_assign", "target": "node_transform", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_transform_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_transform", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["user_json"]}}, {"id": "node_assign", "type": "variable_assignment", "name": "变量赋值", "config": {"assignments": [{"variable_name": "temp_value", "value_type": "string", "value": "Initial Value"}, {"variable_name": "computed_value", "value_type": "expression", "value": "1 + 1"}]}}, {"id": "node_transform", "type": "variable_transform", "name": "变量转换", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "user_json", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "user_json"]}], "input_variable": "{user_json}", "transform_type": "extract_json_path", "transform_args": {"path": "data.items.0"}, "output_variable": "extracted_item"}}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "temp_value", "type": "string", "source": ["node_assign", "temp_value"]}, {"name": "computed_value", "type": "string", "source": ["node_assign", "computed_value"]}, {"name": "extracted_item", "type": "string", "source": ["node_transform", "extracted_item"]}], "outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "temp", "type": "string", "value": "{temp_value}", "children": []}, {"name": "computed", "type": "string", "value": "{computed_value}", "children": []}, {"name": "extracted", "type": "string", "value": "{extracted_item}", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_assign", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_assign", "target": "node_transform", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_transform", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
